summary: Completed testing of 4 new POS features: (1) Product purchase history in ProductDetailPage, (2) Price warnings when sale price < purchase price, (3) Receipt settings in Settings page (Printer tab), (4) Previous sales history with date filtering in POS page. All backend APIs (13/13) passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.

passed_tests.feature: Previous Sales Button in POS Page
passed_tests.details: Button with data-testid='previous-sales-btn' found and clickable. Opens Previous Sales dialog correctly.

passed_tests.feature: Previous Sales Dialog with Date Filters
passed_tests.details: Dialog shows 4 filter tabs: اليوم (Today), الأسبوع (Week), الشهر (Month), مخصص (Custom). Summary stats show sales count, total, and credit sales. Table displays sale records with invoice number, date, customer, items, total, status, and actions.

passed_tests.feature: Receipt Settings in Settings Page - Printer Tab
passed_tests.details: Settings page Printer tab (الطابعة) shows Receipt Settings section (إعدادات الإيصال) with: auto-print toggle (طباعة تلقائية بعد البيع), show print dialog toggle (عرض حوار الطباعة), default template selector (قالب الإيصال الافتراضي) with 3 templates (58mm, 80mm, A4), and template configuration table.

passed_tests.feature: Product History in Product Detail Page
passed_tests.details: Product detail page shows Product History section (سجل المنتج) with 3 tabs: المشتريات (Purchases), المبيعات (Sales), الأسعار (Prices). Load History button (تحميل السجل) fetches data. Sales tab shows 2 records for the test product.

Code review confirms price warning logic in ProductDetailPage.js lines 111-129. Warnings show when retail_price < purchase_price, wholesale_price < purchase_price, or super_wholesale_price < purchase_price. Current test product has retail_price (150) > purchase_price (100), so no warning displayed correctly.
Returns receipt settings with auto_print, show_print_dialog, default_template_id, and templates array with 3 template configurations.
Successfully updates and persists receipt settings. Verified with GET after POST.
Supports start_date and end_date query parameters. Tested with today, week, month, and custom date ranges.
Returns HTML invoice content for printing.
Returns purchase history records for a product.
Returns sales history records for a product.
Returns price change history records with product_id filter support.

context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new POS features fully tested and working: (1) Product purchase history in ProductDetailPage at /products/{id} with 3 tabs - Purchases/Sales/Prices, (2) Price warnings display when sale price < purchase price as red alert card, (3) Receipt settings in SettingsPage under Printer tab - includes auto-print, show dialog, template selection, (4) Previous sales dialog in POSPage accessible via History button with date filters (today/week/month/custom). All APIs use standard auth token. RTL Arabic UI working correctly.

pos_page.previous_sales_dialog: Dialog with سجل المبيعات السابقة title
pos_page.sales_summary_cards: 3 cards - sales count (green), total (blue), credit sales (amber)
pos_page.sales_table: Columns: Invoice, Date, Customer, Products, Total, Status, Actions

product_detail_page.history_section: سجل المنتج section with refresh button
product_detail_page.price_warnings: Red alert card when retail < purchase price
